description: A new driver signed up using a referral code from an existing driver. After the new driver completes the required number of trips, the referring driver must be paid their bonus.

nodes.task_description: The system tracks the number of trips completed by a new, referred driver.
When the new driver completes the required number of trips (e.g., 100), the system flags that the referral bonus is due.

expected_outcome.value: An alert is created to pay the bonus.

nodes.task_description: The system identifies the referring driver from the original sign-up code.

expected_outcome.value: The correct referring driver is identified.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically adds the referral bonus amount to the referring driver's next payment cycle.

expected_outcome.value: The bonus is successfully processed for payment.
